creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
x11-toolkits/py-gnome depends on py-gtk2 like this:
RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/pygtk.pth:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/py-gtk
BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/pygtk.pth:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/py-gtk

But ${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/pygtk.pth belongs to devel/py-gobject actually, so the ports should depend on py-gobject instead or (more likely) depend on py-gtk in a correct way. For example, like this:

RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/gtk-1.2/_gtkmodule.so:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/py-gtk
BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/gtk-1.2/_gtkmodule.so:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/py-gtk
